scenario.title: The CI/CD Pipeline Builder
scenario.context: You want to automate your deployment process with CI/CD. You need AI to help create a pipeline that runs tests, builds, and deploys automatically with proper safeguards.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that guides AI to create a complete CI/CD pipeline configuration with testing, building, and deployment stages.
constraints: Include test, build, and deploy stages
scenario.exampleInput: Create GitHub Actions workflow for a TypeScript monorepo. Run tests on all PRs, deploy to staging on merge to develop, deploy to production on merge to main. Notify Slack on failures.
hints: Specify your CI/CD platform and repository structure
Define what triggers each pipeline stage
Think about what conditions should block deployment

scoringGuide.excellent: All stages with dependencies and conditions

rubric.name: Quality Gates
rubric.description: Are quality gates between stages defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: Tests, linting, security checks as gates
Failure alerts, success notifications, status badges

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Create a CI/CD pipeline for this project:

CI/CD PIPELINE: TypeScript Monorepo

---

REPOSITORY STRUCTURE:

```
monorepo/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/          # Next.js frontend
│   └── api/          # Express API
├── packages/
│   ├── shared/       # Shared types/utils
│   └── ui/           # Component library
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/    # CI/CD configs
├── package.json      # Root workspace
└── turbo.json        # Turborepo config
```

---

PIPELINE OVERVIEW:

```yaml
triggers:
  pull_request:
    - Run tests, lint, type-check
    - Build all packages
    - Comment status on PR
    
  push_to_develop:
    - All PR checks
    - Deploy to staging
    - Run E2E tests against staging
    - Notify Slack
    
  push_to_main:
    - All checks
    - Deploy to production
    - Smoke tests
    - Notify Slack + create release
```

---

GITHUB ACTIONS WORKFLOW:

```yaml
# .github/workflows/ci.yml
name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [develop, main]
  push:
    branches: [develop, main]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  TURBO_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TURBO_TOKEN }}
  TURBO_TEAM: ${{ vars.TURBO_TEAM }}

jobs:
  # ============================================
  # STAGE 1: Quality Checks (always runs)
  # ============================================
  quality:
    name: Quality Checks
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 2  # For turbo to detect changes

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Lint
        run: npx turbo lint

      - name: Type check
        run: npx turbo type-check

      - name: Unit tests
        run: npx turbo test -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'

  # ============================================
  # STAGE 2: Build (requires quality)
  # ============================================
  build:
    name: Build
    needs: quality
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build all packages
        run: npx turbo build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: |
            apps/web/.next
            apps/api/dist
          retention-days: 1

  # ============================================
  # STAGE 3: Deploy Staging (develop branch only)
  # ============================================
  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.myapp.com
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output

      - name: Deploy Web to Vercel (Staging)
        uses: amondnet/vercel-action@v25
        with:
          vercel-token: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
          vercel-org-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID }}
          vercel-project-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID }}
          working-directory: apps/web
          alias-domains: staging.myapp.com

      - name: Deploy API to Railway (Staging)
        uses: bervProject/railway-deploy@v1
        with:
          railway-token: ${{ secrets.RAILWAY_TOKEN }}
          service: api-staging

      - name: Run database migrations
        run: |
          npx supabase db push --db-url ${{ secrets.STAGING_DATABASE_URL }}

  # ============================================
  # STAGE 4: E2E Tests (after staging deploy)
  # ============================================
  e2e-staging:
    name: E2E Tests (Staging)
    needs: deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install Playwright
        run: npx playwright install --with-deps

      - name: Run E2E tests
        run: npx playwright test
        env:
          BASE_URL: https://staging.myapp.com

      - name: Upload test results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: failure()
        with:
          name: playwright-report
          path: playwright-report/

  # ============================================
  # STAGE 5: Deploy Production (main branch only)
  # ============================================
  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://myapp.com
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output

      - name: Deploy Web to Vercel (Production)
        uses: amondnet/vercel-action@v25
        with:
          vercel-token: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
          vercel-org-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID }}
          vercel-project-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID }}
          vercel-args: '--prod'
          working-directory: apps/web

      - name: Deploy API to Railway (Production)
        uses: bervProject/railway-deploy@v1
        with:
          railway-token: ${{ secrets.RAILWAY_TOKEN }}
          service: api-production

      - name: Run database migrations
        run: |
          npx supabase db push --db-url ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DATABASE_URL }}

  # ============================================
  # STAGE 6: Smoke Tests (after production deploy)
  # ============================================
  smoke-tests:
    name: Production Smoke Tests
    needs: deploy-production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Health check
        run: |
          curl -f https://myapp.com/api/health || exit 1
          curl -f https://api.myapp.com/health || exit 1

      - name: Critical path test
        run: |
          npx playwright test tests/smoke.spec.ts
        env:
          BASE_URL: https://myapp.com

  # ============================================
  # NOTIFICATIONS
  # ============================================
  notify-success:
    name: Notify Success
    needs: [deploy-production, smoke-tests]
    if: success()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Slack notification
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v1
        with:
          payload: |
            {
              "text": "✅ Production deployment successful",
              "blocks": [
                {
                  "type": "section",
                  "text": {
                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                    "text": "*Production Deployed* \n Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK }}

  notify-failure:
    name: Notify Failure
    needs: [quality, build, deploy-staging, deploy-production]
    if: failure()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Slack notification
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v1
        with:
          payload: |
            {
              "text": "❌ Pipeline failed",
              "blocks": [
                {
                  "type": "section",
                  "text": {
                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                    "text": "*Pipeline Failed* \n <${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}|View logs>"
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK }}
```

---

QUALITY GATES:

```yaml
gate_1_code_quality:
  blocks: build
  checks:
    - ESLint passes (zero errors)
    - TypeScript compiles (zero errors)
    - All unit tests pass
    - Coverage above threshold (80%)

gate_2_build:
  blocks: deploy
  checks:
    - Build completes successfully
    - Bundle size within limits
    - No security vulnerabilities

gate_3_staging:
  blocks: production (recommended)
  checks:
    - E2E tests pass on staging
    - No console errors
    - Performance within thresholds

gate_4_smoke:
  blocks: release notification
  checks:
    - Health endpoints respond
    - Critical user journeys work
```

---

SECRETS CONFIGURATION:

```yaml
repository_secrets:
  - VERCEL_TOKEN
  - VERCEL_ORG_ID
  - VERCEL_PROJECT_ID
  - RAILWAY_TOKEN
  - SLACK_WEBHOOK
  - TURBO_TOKEN

environment_secrets:
  staging:
    - STAGING_DATABASE_URL
  production:
    - PRODUCTION_DATABASE_URL
```
